title: 5.0 COM Rx processing using SUM_SSC - Protected Message (ARC)

content.text: This page is to summarize the COM Rx processing in VIP using SUM_SSC

items: When a signal is received by COM, it will call the respective callback configured for the callback
In the callback, the update and timeout flag is set
and an event for the signal is set to OS
OS will call respective Rx runnable in SUM_SSC
SUM_SSC will extract ARC, MAC and signal value from Signal group
And call SUM_SSM with ARC value
Writes the MAC and signal values to the respective ports
